title: Resource
description: A Resource is the product-level entity — it maps from an Operational Noun and is realized as a Page in UI and a REST resource in API.

name.description: The PascalCase name of the resource.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this resource represents.

noun.description: The Operational Noun this resource maps from.

fields.description: The fields that describe this resource, mapped from Attributes.

actions.description: The actions that can be performed on this resource.

examples.name: Loan
examples.description: A financial loan visible to borrowers and underwriters.
